interpretation.precision_at_k: Exact DOI/title overlap against task gold rows with human_relevance >= 4.
interpretation.ndcg_at_k: Rank quality using matched gold human_relevance as gain.
interpretation.gold_doi_hit_rate_at_k: Exact DOI hits divided by verified DOI gold labels for the task.
interpretation.doi_accuracy_at_k: Share of returned DOI-bearing papers that the Worker marked Crossref-verified.
interpretation.paper_validity_rate_at_k: Share of returned papers with DOI, verified Crossref status, title match, and journal match.
interpretation.top_journal_precision_at_k: Share of returned papers in approved international S or A1 journals.
interpretation.oa_success_rate_at_k: Share of returned papers with successful OA metadata or OA URLs.
